mapper.select:
SELECT A.rqst_no AS rqstNo , A.title AS title , A.cont AS cont , A.rqst_id AS rqstId , A.ins_dt AS insDt , A.upt_dt AS uptDt , A.views AS views , A.board_type AS boardType , A.group_no AS groupNo , A.parent_no AS parentNo , A.depth AS depth , A.order_no AS orderNo , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM file_table WHERE board_no = A.rqst_no AND is_deleted = FALSE) > 0 AS hasFile , (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(file_size), 0) FROM file_table WHERE board_no = A.rqst_no AND is_deleted = FALSE) AS totalFileSize , A.secret AS secret , A.password AS password , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE board_no = A.rqst_no) AS commentCount FROM board A WHERE A.board_type = 'YOUTH'
AND A.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND A.cont LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND A.rqst_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND (A.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR A.cont LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY A.group_no DESC, A.order_no ASC, A.ins_dt DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board A WHERE A.board_type = 'YOUTH'
AND A.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND A.cont LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND A.rqst_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND (A.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR A.cont LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

SELECT A.rqst_no AS rqstNo , A.title AS title , A.cont AS cont , A.rqst_id AS rqstId , A.ins_dt AS insDt , A.upt_dt AS uptDt , A.views AS views , A.board_type AS boardType , A.group_no AS groupNo , A.parent_no AS parentNo , A.depth AS depth , A.order_no AS orderNo , A.secret AS secret , A.password AS password , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM file_table WHERE board_no = A.rqst_no AND is_deleted = FALSE) > 0 AS hasFile FROM board A WHERE A.rqst_no = #{rqstNo} AND A.board_type = 'YOUTH'
mapper.update: UPDATE board SET views = COALESCE(views, 0) + 1 WHERE rqst_no = #{rqstNo} AND board_type = 'YOUTH'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board (rqst_no, title, cont, rqst_id, ins_dt, upt_dt, views, group_no, parent_no, depth, order_no, secret, password, board_type) SELECT #{rqstNo}, #{title}, #{cont}, #{rqstId}, NOW(), NOW(), 0, COALESCE(NULLIF(#{groupNo}, ''), P.group_no, #{rqstNo}), #{parentNo}, COALESCE(#{depth}, COALESCE(P.depth, -1) + 1), #{orderNo}, COALESCE(#{secret}, 'N'), #{password}, 'YOUTH' FROM (SELECT 1) AS dummy LEFT JOIN board P ON P.rqst_no = #{parentNo}
mapper.select: SELECT comment_id AS commentId, board_no AS boardNo, writer, content, ins_dt AS insDt, likes, dislikes, parent_comment_id AS parentCommentId, secret, password, spoiler FROM comment WHERE board_no = #{boardNo} ORDER BY ins_dt ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment (board_no, writer, content, ins_dt, likes, dislikes, parent_comment_id, secret, password, spoiler) VALUES (#{boardNo}, #{writer}, #{content}, NOW(), 0, 0, #{parentCommentId}, COALESCE(#{secret}, 'N'), #{password}, COALESCE(#{spoiler}, 'N'))
mapper.select: SELECT comment_id AS commentId, board_no AS boardNo, writer, content, ins_dt AS insDt, likes, dislikes, parent_comment_id AS parentCommentId, secret, password, spoiler FROM comment WHERE comment_id = #{commentId}
mapper.update: UPDATE comment SET likes = likes + 1 WHERE comment_id = #{commentId}
UPDATE comment SET likes = likes - 1 WHERE comment_id = #{commentId}
UPDATE comment SET dislikes = dislikes + 1 WHERE comment_id = #{commentId}
UPDATE comment SET dislikes = dislikes - 1 WHERE comment_id = #{commentId}
